footer.tagline: AI Agents as a Service. Full REST API, integration in minutes.

landing.badge: 7 days free — no credit card required

hero.description: Create your own intelligent chat widget on your website in minutes. Build specialized agents, a full REST API, and Widget API that works on any page — all in one place.

how.title: Works in 4 steps
how.subtitle: From zero to a chat widget on your site in less than 10 minutes.
how.step1Desc: 7 days free, no card. Full access to the Widget Builder and all 9 agents.
how.step2Desc: Choose the agent, customize colors, text and position with the visual Widget Builder.
how.step3Desc: One code block. Paste it in your HTML and the chat appears instantly.
how.step4Desc: Upgrade to the plan you need. No contracts, cancel anytime.

agents.title: 6 Specialized Agents
agents.subtitle: Each agent is trained for its domain. Choose one, send data, receive insights.

features.title: Everything you need to integrate AI
features.subtitle: From embeddings to billing — we handle the infrastructure so you can focus on your product.
features.secureDesc: API key auth, rate limiting per plan, tenant-isolated data.
features.analyticsDesc: Dashboard with requests, latency, top endpoints and live costs.
features.multitenantDesc: Each API key has isolated data, independent rate limits and separate billing.

widget.title: Your sales agent that never sleeps
widget.subtitle: Deploy an intelligent chat on your site in less than 5 minutes. Answer questions, qualify leads and close sales — 24 hours a day.
widget.b1Desc: No waiting. The customer receives a response in less than 1 second.
widget.b2Desc: The agent identifies purchase intent and prioritizes hot contacts.
widget.b3Desc: One script and done. Compatible with any web, CMS or ecommerce.
widget.b4Desc: Colors, logo, position and tone fully customizable.
widget.b5Desc: Measure opens, messages and leads generated from the dashboard.
widget.msg1: Hi! 👋 I'm your assistant. Are you looking for information about our plans?
widget.msg2: Yes, what's included in the Growth plan?
widget.msg3: Growth includes unlimited agents, RAG with files/URLs and advanced analytics. Start with 7 days free — no card required. 🚀
widget.socialProof: <red>+320 companies</red> already use MatIAs to convert more visitors into customers

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: 7-day free trial. No contracts. Cancel anytime.
pricing.ragNotIncluded: No document RAG — available from Growth
pricing.ragTechnical: RAG technical limit: {mb} MB or {sources} sources per agent

features: 1 custom agent · AI Chat + basic analytics (no RAG)

items.a: Full access to the Widget Builder, all agents and the SDK. No limits during the trial period.

items.q: Do I need a credit card to sign up?
items.a: No. Just email and password. A card is only required when you choose a paid plan.

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes. No contracts or penalties. Cancel and access continues until the end of the paid period.

items.q: Does the widget work on any website?
items.a: Yes. Any HTML page. You just need to include the script and call window.AgentFlowhub.init().

items.q: What happens if I exceed the request limit?
items.a: We notify you before reaching the limit. You can upgrade your plan or wait for the next cycle.

cta.subtitle: No card. Cancel anytime. Your first widget live in minutes.
